Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Underneath the glove, his limb feels rather tough. The bark on some of the other Kweebecs, whose hands you've shaken, typically resembles the squishiness of a flower's stalk.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: French Kweebec must be decently old, then -- or perhaps he wears reinforced gloves for some reason. Or maybe that's just what happens when a Kweebec's body part can't photosynthesize, as something tells you that this guy spends most of his time in this costume.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Regardless, unfortunately for you -- or fortunately, if you're put off by that fact -- French Kweebec stops all motion moments later. His other hand unlatches to gently peel your fingers off.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I appreciate the help, mon ami, but this is not the way to do it. You are putting more effort on ma main.

Line.Text: If he thought anything else of the gesture, he gives you no indication. He simply returns to the grind.
